subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! Verily, Ḥusayn maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the prison at this hour when sorrows have encompassed him from every side [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین ان الحسین یذکرک من شطر السجن فی هذا الحین الذی احاطته الاحزان من کل
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
